message:
fix(engine): strip trailing empty element from destructuring pattern split

split_pattern_elements produced a trailing empty string when the source
pattern ended with a comma followed by whitespace (e.g., "a, b, ").
This caused downstream destructuring to create a phantom empty binding.
Pop the last element if it is whitespace-only and the trimmed source
ends with a comma.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
